JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, THOMAS WRIGHT APPEARING FOR PLTF; DEFT. JAMES ALVIN SMITH NOT PRESENT; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, JAMES ALVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH ST, ROOM 532 $1,385.74 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.74, LEASE FORFEITED, NO ATTY. FEES, INTEREST OR COSTS.
